text: README 文件摘要： 【基于前 20 行内容提炼的 3 句话摘要】 {"action":"read_range","end_line":20,"excerpt":"1|# RustClaw 2| 3| 4| 5|Chinese version: `README.zh-CN.md` 6| 7|RustClaw is a local Rust-based agent runtime for everyday operations through Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, and a browser UI.
